title: Reach Circles
description: A lightweight client-side reach circle mod for Minecraft that visually displays your exact reach distance. Fully rewritten from scratch and inspired by Viboten’s original concept, with support for versions other reach mod don’t cover.
body:
Reach Circles

Reach Circle is a lightweight, fully client-side mod for Minecraft that visually displays reach distance in real time not just for you, but for other players as well.

This mod renders accurate reach circles around players, giving you clear visual feedback for combat, positioning, and interaction range. It’s especially useful for PvP, practice servers, and players who want better spatial awareness during fights.

Features

* Displays **your reach distance**
* Displays **other players’ reach distance**
* Dynamic **color changes** when entering or leaving reach range
* Visual indicator when you enter someone else’s reach
* Fully **customizable colors**
* Clean and minimal visual design
* Optimized for performance
* 100% client-side

The circle colors automatically change when:

* A player enters your reach
* A player leaves your reach
* You enter another player's reach

This provides instant visual feedback during combat engagements.

Customization

The mod includes configurable options that allow you to:

* Change circle colors
* Customize enter/exit reach indicators
* Adjust visuals to match your PvP setup or resource pack

Credits

Inspired by the original concept by Viboten.
This implementation was fully rewritten and developed independently from scratch to support different versions that other reach circle mods do not cover.
